label_i18n.es: Radio de punta de la herramienta

businessContext_i18n.es: Radio de la punta del inserto.

inputs.label: Cutting Speed
inputs.businessContext: Cutting speed (not directly used in roughness formula but provided for reference).

businessContext_i18n.en: Cutting speed (not directly used in roughness formula but provided for reference).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesme hızı (pürüzlülük formülünde doğrudan kullanılmaz, referans olarak verilmiştir).
businessContext_i18n.de: Schnittgeschwindigkeit (nicht direkt in der Rauheitsformel verwendet, aber als Referenz angegeben).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Vitesse de coupe (non utilisée directement dans la formule de rugosité mais fournie à titre indicatif).
businessContext_i18n.es: Velocidad de corte (no se usa directamente en la fórmula de rugosidad, se proporciona como referencia).
businessContext_i18n.ar: سرعة القطع (غير مستخدمة مباشرة في معادلة الخشونة ولكنها مقدمة كمرجع).

inputs.label: Depth of Cut
inputs.businessContext: Depth of cut (affects forces, minor effect on finish).

businessContext_i18n.en: Depth of cut (affects forces, minor effect on finish).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesme derinliği (kuvvetleri etkiler, yüzey kalitesine küçük etkisi vardır).
businessContext_i18n.de: Schnitttiefe (beeinflusst Kräfte, geringe Auswirkung auf die Oberflächengüte).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Profondeur de passe (affecte les efforts, effet mineur sur l'état de surface).
businessContext_i18n.es: Profundidad de corte (afecta las fuerzas, efecto menor en el acabado).
businessContext_i18n.ar: عمق القطع (يؤثر على القوى، تأثير طفيف على التشطيب).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
